title: A Baller
description: Wordle style footballer guessing mobile app.
longDescription: A Baller is a mobile game inspired by Wordle, but focused entirely on football. Players are given visual and statistical clues to guess a mystery footballer each day. Built with React Native and Expo for cross-platform support, it uses Zustand for lightweight state management. The game features daily challenges, a streak system, and a growing database of players from top leagues around the world.

title: GameTrans
longDescription: GameTrans is a desktop tool that captures on-screen text from any game in real time and translates it instantly using the DeepL API. It leverages EasyOCR with CUDA acceleration to process frames at high speed, and a smart cache system avoids re-translating repeated strings, keeping latency minimal. Designed for players who want to enjoy foreign-language games without switching windows.

title: Mysterious Glove
description: It is a third-person character-based game on survival against bots.
longDescription: Mysterious Glove is a third-person survival game built in Unreal Engine 5. The player controls a unique glove-based character navigating an eerie environment while fending off increasingly intelligent bots. The project makes heavy use of UE5 Blueprints for rapid prototyping alongside custom C++ logic for performance-critical gameplay systems such as AI pathfinding and combat mechanics.

title: Cinesatchel
description: A TV series and movie website based on Netflix as requirements.
longDescription: Cinesatchel is a Netflix-inspired web app for discovering and browsing movies and TV series. Built with React and SASS, it fetches data from a public movie API to display trending content, detailed show pages, and category-based browsing. The project was deployed on Vercel and focused on replicating a polished streaming-platform UI with smooth transitions and responsive design.

title: MekanBul
longDescription: MekanBul is a venue discovery platform that helps users find places to visit — cafes, restaurants, and social spots — based on their current location or a searched area. Built with JavaScript and Pug templating and hosted on Replit, it provides a clean interface for filtering and exploring local venues with a focus on simplicity and fast load times.

title: Portfolio Template
description: Minimal and elegant portfolio template with dark mode, smooth animations, and full responsiveness.
longDescription: A fully featured personal portfolio template built with Nuxt 3, GSAP, and Tailwind CSS. It includes dark/light mode via @nuxtjs/color-mode, GSAP-powered scroll reveal and hero entrance animations, a typewriter effect, multilingual support (TR/EN), and a static SSG deployment pipeline targeting Vercel. Designed to be minimal, fast, and easily customizable.
